text.tspan: POLYGLOT PERSISTENCE: 'use the right tool for each job'
Instead of one DB for everything, choose specialized stores for each workload's characteristics.

g.text: EXAMPLE: a single application's data layer

text.tspan: + each workload runs on optimal store u2192 better perf, lower cost
+ avoid the 'square peg, round hole' from forcing one DB to do everything
u2212 operational complexity (8 DBs to monitor, back up, upgrade)
u2212 transactional boundaries can't cross stores (need [saga](../data/saga.md))
u2212 talent breadth: team needs to know N technologies
u2212 data movement / sync between stores ([CDC](../data/cdc.md), [outbox](../data/outbox.md))
